zh.lifeSummary: 當John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean於1280年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾時，他的父親Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean41歲，母親Roighnach Rignach of Carrick41歲。他於大約1323年與Cumming在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1330年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean于1280年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾时，他的父亲Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean41岁，母亲Roighnach Rignach of Carrick41岁。他于大约1323年与Cumming在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1330年在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Dubh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a common nickname for bearers of any of the Scottish and Irish patronymic surnames beginning with Mac or Mc, this is now sometimes used as an independent first name, especially in the U.S.

en.lifeSummary: When John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean was born in 1280, in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean, was 41 and his mother, Roighnach Rignach of Carrick, was 41. He married Cumming about 1323, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1330, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean est né en 1280, à Knapdale, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Roighnach Rignach of Carrick, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Cumming environ 1323, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1330, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean 1280 in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean 41 und seine Mutter Roighnach Rignach of Carrick 41. Er hat um 1323 in Scotland Cumming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1330 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean è nato il nel 1280 nel Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Roighnach Rignach of Carrick, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Cumming circa 1323, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1330, nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルナプダル
ja.Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストル

ja.lifeSummary: John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLeanが1280年にスコットランドアルグイルナプダルで生まれた時，父Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLeanは41歳，母Roighnach Rignach of Carrickは41歳であった。約1323年にスコットランドでCummingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1330年にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで51歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean(이)가 1280년 스컷랜드 아그이 냅데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Roighnach Rignach of Carrick(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1323년 스컷랜드에서 Cumming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1330년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean nasceu em 1280, em Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Roighnach Rignach of Carrick, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Cumming aproximadamente 1323, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1330, em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean родился в 1280 г. в местности напдеил, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Roighnach Rignach of Carrick, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Cumming около 1323 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1330 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean nació en 1280, en Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Malcolm Gillie Coluim 3rd Chief of MacLean, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Roighnach Rignach of Carrick, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Cumming aproximadamente 1323, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1330, en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
